$comment:
purpose: tool error envelope schema enforcing closed recoveryHint enum
consumes: per-tool failure category + upstream status
produces: JSON body the agent runner can dispatch on without parsing prose
depends-on: agent runner with hint->action map (templates/runner_policy.yaml)
token-budget-impact: ~250 tokens to render in agent context
title: ToolError

message.description: One human sentence. No stack trace.

details.description: Sanitised key-value details. Never raw stack frames.
